aljazeera.title: Man in Gaza survives double tap Israeli strike on vehicle
Video: At least two killed and hundreds displaced in Israeli attack on Gaza
What is Iran looking for in any upcoming talks with the US?

monitor_the_situation.title: — S4 · Conflict · Beirut, Lebanon · 18h ago. Lebanon's Health Ministry says at least 4,257 people have been killed in Israeli attacks since March 2, 2026.
Israeli Strike Hits Vehicle in Gaza, Survivor Reported
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 1m ago. A man survived a double-tap Israeli airstrike on a vehicle in the Gaza Strip, amid ongoing conflict between Israel and Hamas.

— S3 · Conflict · Iran-Iraq Border · 2h ago. Kurdish rebels have clashed with Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in a significant border escalation, raising concerns about a potential new insurgency.
Palestinian Killed in Gaza City Attack
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza City, Palestine · 3h ago. A Palestinian was killed in an attack in Gaza City, according to sources.
